excerpt: The official programme page for MA in Sociology lists Final round opening on 2025-09-01 and closing on 2026-02-28. Source: https://www.gs.cuhk.edu.hk/admissions/application-deadline Priority Round: 8 November 2025 Final Round: 28 February 2026 Applications will be processed on a rolling basis until all places have been filled. Therefore, early applications are strongly encouraged.
